inputs.experiment_data: Experiment: Landing page headline test. Duration: 10 days. Variant A ('Automate Your Sales Pipeline with AI'): 1,200 impressions, 28 signups (2.3 percent conversion), $840 ad spend, 2 paid conversions ($298 revenue). Variant B ('Close 3x More Deals Without Hiring SDRs'): 1,180 impressions, 41 signups (3.5 percent conversion), $826 ad spend, 5 paid conversions ($745 revenue). Variant C ('AI Sales Automation for Growing Teams'): 1,150 impressions, 22 signups (1.9 percent conversion), $810 ad spend, 1 paid conversion ($149 revenue).
